emails.subject: Seminole Electric Cooperative, Inc.
emails.body: Hi Tana, Profile Manager is pending your approval for Seminole Electric Cooperative, Inc. Customer is calling regarding status of his application. He applied 4-23-01 Call me if you have any questions. Thank you, Claudia

emails.subject: FW: Seminole Electric Cooperative, Inc.
emails.body: It sounds like we may not need to follow up with this counterparty. Any dealmaker interested in business with them? If not, I think we should just inactivate them.

emails.subject: FW: Seminole Electric Cooperative, Inc.
emails.body: If we have not located any dealmaker interested in this counterparty can we close out this counterparty and get it out of the work cue?
